segments.text: Keeps the offense rolling with those mix-ups!
segments.original_text: 混ぜしながら浮かした展開そのまま火力を伸ばす
そして復帰阻止に回されて追いかけた

segments.text: Doesn't let that dodge out and takes the punish!
segments.original_text: 回り込み回避もしっかりと許さず取ってくる
これマジで当たらんかった

segments.text: And that aerial takes the stock!
segments.original_text: そして空中攻撃このまま撃墜に至っている

full_text: Keeps the offense rolling with those mix-ups! And goes for the edgeguard! Doesn't let that dodge out and takes the punish! That completely whiffed! And that aerial takes the stock! Incredibly tight!
